---
name: Bug report
about: Report issues with the mod
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---
**!!!READ THIS FIRST BEFORE SUBMITTING!!!**

The following are considered invalid reports and will be deleted:
* Lack of sounds (unless they stopped playing while already in-game)
* Crashes when launching the game in unsupported devices (tablets, phones, steam deck etc.) or launchers other than MultiMC
* Crashes without a crash log provided (especially those with no information or steps to reproduce).
* Reports for any mods besides Infdev+. This repository is for Infdev+ ONLY. If you report an issue with Indev+ or Alpha Recrafted, it will be deleted, as those mods are no longer supported.

**Please fill in the report below and remove this and the above text to confirm you have read it!**

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Steps to reproduce**
Please be as descriptive as you can to make it easier for us to try and reproduce the issue.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Additional Information (this can be found in the debug screen/F3 menu):**
 - OS: [e.g. Windows, Linux, Mac. Make sure to also include version and/or distro!]
 - Java version: [e.g. 1.8]
 - Mod version: [e.g. 1.0.22_02]
 - GPU: [e.g. RTX 3060 Ti]
 - GPU Driver: [get it from the debug screen]

**Crashlog**
If applicable, please ALWAYS provide the crash log here! You can either get the full log from the MultiMC console (but beware it resets if you relaunch the game), or the log stored in the instance folder. Any crash report without a log will be considered null and void!
